title: Fun engine framework key Element BPMS Template

title.description: The name of the BPMS element (e.g., "['Epigenetic Memory'(-ing) BPMS]")

description.description: The application or function of the element, typically starting with 'Scope of Application: Applies to...'

tags.description: A comma-separated list of hyphenated keywords and tags. typically starting with 'Tags: ...'
